method_summary: VANGUARD framework that unifies anomaly classification, spatial grounding, and chain-of-thought reasoning within a single VLM using a three-stage curriculum training approach and teacher-student annotation pipeline
key_innovation: Three-stage curriculum training approach with classifier warmup, LoRA-adapted spatial grounding, and chain-of-thought generation
title: Reasoning-Guided Grounding: Elevating Video Anomaly Detection through Multimodal Large Language Models
